utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists two components (physical and mental) with named plans and monthly costs, plus a total health cost. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides a named home contents plan and a monthly cost (€60/month). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. The plan lists a premium travel plan and an adventure add-on with their costs and a total travel cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists enhancement services but does not provide any costs specific to these services; it only states they are included, without incremental cost details. Not fully specified per the requirement to include costs.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly and annual totals and a comparison. Fully specified.
Thus, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item named in the final coverage plan to the closest exact product name in the ground-truth catalog. For health physical and mental, the plan specifies LifeFirst Standard Physical Health and LifeFirst Standard Mental Health; these correspond to LifeFirst Standard Plan in the primary_health_coverage sections (physical and mental), both rated 9. For property, LifeFirst Standard Home Content corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Coverage under home_content, rated 9. For travel, PrimeTravel Premium Plan directly matches and is rated 6. The Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on matches Adventure Travel Coverage under travel_enhancement_services, rated 10.
